title: SRS Protocol Definition (ext:protocol)
description: Declares a step-wise workflow for authoring or capturing a Record. A Protocol is a Package definition (not an instance Record): it lives under package/protocols/ and is registered in package.json → protocols[]. Each stage defines a capturing step with optional field references, guidance, and dependency ordering.

protocolId.description: Composite identifier in the form namespace/name@version (e.g. com.example/decision@1). Stable across updates within a lineage.

protocolName.description: Machine-readable name within the namespace, kebab-case.

protocolVersion.description: Monotonically increasing version integer within this Protocol's ID lineage.

protocolDescription.description: Human-readable description of what this Protocol captures and when to use it. Optional.

protocolTargetType.description: The Record Type ID or composite name this Protocol targets. Used to dispatch the correct Protocol when a Record of this type is being authored.

protocolStages.description: Stages of the capturing workflow. Each stage contributes to one or more Fields on the target Record. Stages are sequenced by the 'order' property; 'dependsOn' constrains partial ordering.

protocolCreatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this Protocol was first authored.

ProtocolStage.description: A single stage in the Protocol workflow. additionalProperties is true: stage fields beyond those listed here are preserved verbatim (value-centric storage), permitting richer stage shapes (e.g. future fields from srs-rust#130).

stageId.description: Stable identifier for this stage within the Protocol.

name.description: Human-readable stage name shown in the UI.

purpose.description: Short description of what this stage is trying to elicit. Optional.

order.description: Sort position of this stage. A stage with dependsOn must have a strictly higher order than each dependency.

dependsOn.description: stageIds that must be completed before this stage. Defaults to empty array when absent.

question.description: The capturing question presented to the user for this stage. Optional.

completionCriteria.description: Human-readable criteria for when this stage is considered complete. Optional.

contributesTo.description: The Field(s) on the target Record that this stage populates. Optional.

aiGuidance.description: Guidance for AI-assisted capturing. Structure is implementation-defined. Optional.

outputType.description: Describes the expected output type of this stage. Structure is implementation-defined. Optional.

FieldRef.description: A reference to a Field within a Type, optionally scoped to a specific Type when the same fieldId appears in multiple Types.

typeId.description: UUID of the Type that owns this Field. Omit when unambiguous from context. Optional.
